headline: Truist is Bullish on Heritage Insurance Holdings, Inc. (HRTG)
summary: Heritage Insurance Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:HRTG) is one of the 10 Most Profitable Small Cap Stocks to Buy. On May 12, Truist analyst Mark Hughes lowered Heritage Insurance Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:HRTG)’s price target to $36 from $39. The analyst maintained a “Buy” rating on the shares. It stated that a first-quarter earnings miss was pushed by […]
